Headline: Red, Brown, and Purple Line Delays
ShortDescription: Red, Brown, & Purple Line trains are running w/significant delays following earlier signal problems at Belmont. Service is resuming, allow extra time

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red, Brown, & Purple Line trains are running w/significant delays and congestion following earlier signal problems at Belmont.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service:

Shuttles buses are available in both directions for the following until 4:45pm:

Brown Line from Kimball to Belmont to provide connecting service through the affected area.

Red/Purple Line from Howard to Belmont to provide connecting service through the affected area.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
